mapper.select: SELECT id, name, provider, type, url, api_key, icon, ext_params, create_time FROM ai_model_providers ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_model_providers (name, provider, type, url, api_key, icon, ext_params) VALUES (#{name}, #{provider}, #{type}, #{url}, #{apiKey}, #{icon}, #{extParams})
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_model_providers SET name = #{name}, provider = #{provider}, type = #{type}, url = #{url}, api_key = #{apiKey}, icon = #{icon}, ext_params = #{extParams} WHERE id = #{id}
